title: Connector state becomes assistant-readable evidence
steps: Review connector evidence cards for status, auth mode/state, and health.
Create an assistant review item from a connector with WARN status.
expected: Evidence JSON contains no authConfigRef, tokens, secrets, or passwords.
AssistantEvidenceRecord and AssistantAuditEvent are created for the connector.
Assistant action queue receives a human review item with an API Hub source link.

title: Staging batch creates reviewable assistant work
steps: Create or open a staging batch from API Hub mapping analysis.
Open /apihub/assistant and find the staging evidence card.
Create assistant review work from the staging evidence.
expected: Review item summarizes row count, status, applied state, and apply summary.
Downstream SO/PO/CT records are not applied by the assistant evidence action.
Operator can open source workspace to manually dry-run or apply using existing API Hub controls.

title: Apply conflict becomes explainable assistant evidence
steps: Trigger or inspect an API Hub apply conflict.
Create review work from the apply conflict evidence.
expected: Conflict explanation includes ingestion run, result code, HTTP status, dry-run state, and no-silent-mutation warning.
Review item links to Apply conflicts and queues assistant work.
No credentials or raw secret fields are exposed in the evidence payload.
